report.title: Big British Garden Survey Gardens map
report.description: A map of gardens registered for the Big British Garden Survey. Low precision, NUTS 3 level.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM ( SELECT n.id AS nuts_id, COUNT(g.id) AS garden_count FROM locations n JOIN locations g ON St_Intersects(g.boundary_geom, n.boundary_geom) AND /*g.location_type_id=24469 AND*/ g.deleted=false WHERE n.location_type_id=15 AND n.deleted=false GROUP BY n.id ) AS agg JOIN locations n ON n.id=agg.nuts_id

column.name: fo
column.sql: CASE WHEN MAX(agg.garden_count) OVER () = MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER () THEN 0.6 ELSE 0.5 + 0.2 * ( (agg.garden_count - MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER ())::float / NULLIF((MAX(agg.garden_count) OVER () - MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER ()), 0) ) END

column.name: fc
column.sql: '#' || LPAD(TO_HEX(ROUND(255 + ( CASE WHEN MAX(agg.garden_count) OVER () = MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER () THEN 0.5 ELSE (agg.garden_count - MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER ())::float / NULLIF((MAX(agg.garden_count) OVER () - MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER ()), 0) END ) * (189 - 255))::int), 2, '0') || LPAD(TO_HEX(ROUND(255 + ( CASE WHEN MAX(agg.garden_count) OVER () = MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER () THEN 0.5 ELSE (agg.garden_count - MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER ())::float / NULLIF((MAX(agg.garden_count) OVER () - MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER ()), 0) END ) * (0 - 255))::int), 2, '0') || LPAD(TO_HEX(ROUND(178 + ( CASE WHEN MAX(agg.garden_count) OVER () = MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER () THEN 0.5 ELSE (agg.garden_count - MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER ())::float / NULLIF((MAX(agg.garden_count) OVER () - MIN(agg.garden_count) OVER ()), 0) END ) * (38 - 178))::int), 2, '0')
